channel.title: Not able to download different origin image directly using anchor tag
channel.description:
I am facing an issue regarding the downloading of the image using WordPress URL Image path as it is stored in IMG tag src so want to use that to directly download the image through a browser as it gets downloaded then on opening **format is not supported** coming. If anyone can provide me with this solution.
Thanks & Regards Ankit Sah

item.title: Not able to download different origin image directly using anchor tag
item.dc:creator: ankitsah1997
item.description:
I am facing an issue regarding the downloading of the image using WordPress URL Image path as it is stored in IMG tag src so want to use that to directly download the image through a browser as it gets downloaded then on opening format is not supported coming. If anyone can provide me with this solution.

Thanks & Regards
Ankit Sah

Read full topic
item.source: Not able to download different origin image directly using anchor tag
